expected_sql: SELECT SUM(order_amount) AS total_sales_amount FROM fact_order

query: 华东地区的销售额是多少
expected_sql: SELECT SUM(f.order_amount) AS total_sales_amount FROM fact_order AS f JOIN dim_region AS r ON f.region_id = r.region_id WHERE r.region_name = '华东'
SELECT p.brand, SUM(f.order_amount) AS total_sales_amount FROM fact_order AS f JOIN dim_product AS p ON f.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.brand
SELECT SUM(f.order_amount) AS total_sales_amount FROM fact_order AS f JOIN dim_date AS d ON f.date_id = d.date_id WHERE d.year = 2025 AND d.month = 3

query: 销售额最高的品牌是什么
expected_sql: SELECT p.brand, SUM(f.order_amount) AS total_sales_amount FROM fact_order AS f JOIN dim_product AS p ON f.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.brand ORDER BY total_sales_amount DESC LIMIT 1
